case_title: CHIN, MABEL VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CHIN, MABEL AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-1993 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIN, MABEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS $1,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,265.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS
